label: Title screen
script: Color Palette Maker...
note: Full title screen, establishing shot

label: Start the app
script: ...can extract meaningful color palettes directly from your images.
note: Gentle push in

label: Review palette library
script: Manage your color palettes...
note: Zoom on upload area

label: Create palette from photo
script: Create a new palette by just uploading a photo.
note: Upload a photo to create palette

label: Rename palette
script: Rename the color palette to something meaningful.
note: Set palette name to 'blues' and pull back to see new palette name

label: Add color swatches
script: Click to start adding color samples.
note: Zoom to click the 'add swatches (click)' checkbox

label: Double-click to add samples
script: [ no narration -- let the visual speak ]
note: Double-click to add some color samples

label: Swatches appear
script: The sampled colors appear as swatches...
note: Zoom toward palette row

label: Hex detail
script: ...each tagged with its hex color value.
note: Tight on one swatch + hex label

label: Delete swatches
script: ...and a delete button.
note: Zoom to delete all swatches

label: K-means control
script: Use k-means clustering to automatically select K primary colors (5, 7, or 9).
note: Hold tight while control changes

label: Silent beat
script: [ no narration -- let the visual speak ]
note: Pull back to show updated swatches

label: Clear all swatches
script: Use the menu to Clear all Swatches.
note: Pull back to show no more swatches

label: Detect regions
script: Click the 'detect all regions' menu item.
note: Pan/zoom to show new regions overlaying the image

label: Delete regions
script: Click the 'Delete Regions (click)' checkbox to delete regions manually.
note: Click on a region to delete it

label: K-means on regions
script: Now use k-means clustering to automatically find the K primary colors (5, 7, or 9) from only the new set of regions.
note: Hold tight while control changes

label: Swatch region matching
script: Now we'll match each region to its nearest swatch.
note: Zoom to image to see all pairs

label: Region-swatch match
script: Swatches have letters, Regions have numbers.
note: Zoom in to see one pair

label: Roll-over regions
script: Roll over a region to see its matched swatch.
note: Zoom out to show regions and swatches

label: Roll-over swatches
script: Roll over a swatch to see its matched region.
note: Zoom out to show regions and swatches

label: Back to intro
script: The Color Palette Maker was built using React, Node.js, and a Python OpenCV pipeline for k-means clustering and smart region detection.
note: Full intro page

label: Camera Script Editor
script: This demo video was created using a custom `Camera Script Editor tool.
note: Full intro page

label: Full stack close
script: that was built using React 18, Vite 5, JSX, and inline styling.
note: Fade out to close
